name: tannery
summary: A tannery laid out around rows of soaking pits and stretched hides. Stinking of lime and urine — always on the edge of town for a reason. Scraping stations and finished leather stacks.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: wide rectangle with pit rows along the long axis

primary_palette.note: classic pit-row tannery — three stages of soak
two-pit operation with heavy stretching area
vat-based finishing tannery — fine leather only

story_prompts: scraping day — beams occupied, foul water sluicing into the drain
stench inspection — a city official with a kerchief, tanner arguing back
hide theft — one pit tipped, finished leather gone, apprentice bound
night quiet — pits bubbling alone, rats feasting on scraps

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: grim working light (0.3-0.4) — often half-open to outside

anti_patterns: pits always at floor level — they're dug, not placed
hides hang on racks near walls — never in the central work paths
don't place food or living-quarters props — this room reeks
